case_title: QUENTIN AKA/LAWRENCE W. RAND VS TERRANCE, A. LEE IND/DBA B J DROUBI REAL ESTATE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY QUENTIN AKA/LAWRENCE W. RAND AS TO DEFENDANT TERRANCE, A. LEE IND/DBA B J DROUBI REAL ESTATE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-1990 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUENTIN AKA/LAWRENCE W. RAND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TERRANCE, A. LEE IND/DBA B J DROUBI REAL ESTATE $975.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $983.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TERRANCE, A. LEE IND/DBA B J DROUBI REAL ESTATE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT QUENTIN AKA/LAWRENCE W. RAND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT ENTERED AS BELOW: DEFENDANT: TERRANCE A. LEE IND/DBA B J DROUDI REAL ESTATE SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: QUENTIN AKA
AKA/LAWRENCE W. RAND $975.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COST NO RECOVERY ON CROSS CLAIM OF LEE VS QUENTIN.

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY TERRANCE, A. LEE IND/DBA B J DROUBI REAL ESTATE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT QUENTIN AKA/LAWRENCE W. RAND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-1990 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 07
PAYMENT OF $15 VOIDED. THIS IS AN OLD CASE RECREATED, SO NO PAYMENT SHOULD HAVE BEEN GENERATED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TERRANCE, A. LEE IND/DBA B J DROUBI REAL ESTATE
DEBTOR'S SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT ON FILE DATED 4/3/97.
